name: You
text: Are there any drug interactions I should be aware of?

name: Medlife.ai
text: "I'm sorry, but I would need more information to provide accurate details about drug interactions for Sakshi Bhagat. It's essential to know the specific medications she is taking along with Metformin to determine potential drug interactions. It's always best to consult with a healthcare professional or pharmacist who has access to the complete list of medications to ensure safety and effectiveness."
